thought.text: I'll help you get the README file from the openGauss project. Let me first check if there's a README file in the repository root.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "ls -la /workspace/project/README*", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "List all README files in the project directory"}

summary: List all README files in the project directory
